title: GARAG: Genetic Attack on RAG for Robustness Evaluation against Minor Textual Errors

defines.name: GARAG
defines.definition: A black-box adversarial attack method that uses a genetic algorithm to search for perturbed documents that simultaneously degrade retriever and reader performance in RAG systems.

problem: Existing RAG robustness evaluations overlook low-level textual noise and the coupled behavior of retriever and reader, missing real-world vulnerabilities to minor document errors.
